title: STARLINK Standard Wall Mount

keySpecs.label: For Starlink Standard Kit and High Performance Kit

offers: Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

description.main: This standard wall mount is designed for mounting your Starlink on an exterior wall under the roof. Made from weather-resistant materials.
goodToKnow: Dimensions: 280 x 470 x 105 mm (H x W x D)
Compatibility: Starlink Standard Kit and High Performance Kit
